name: OpenHarness Governance
description: Multi-level permission modes, path-level rules, command deny lists, and PreToolUse/PostToolUse lifecycle hooks from OpenHarness

mode.description: Permission mode: default (ask before write/execute), auto (allow all), plan (block all writes)

pathRules.description: Path-level permission rules with glob patterns

deniedCommands.description: Commands that are always denied (e.g., 'rm -rf /', 'DROP TABLE *')
